title: Mildly Smoked Vietnamese Chicken Noodles
description: A buttery and silky Vietnamese dish featuring medjool dates and smoked chicken, perfect for meal prep. This dish is dash-friendly and can be prepared in under an hour.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large bowl, whisk together the fish sauce, lime juice, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned and cooked through.
Add the medjool dates to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Drain the noodles and add them to the skillet, tossing to combine with the chicken and dates.
Stir in the chopped scallions and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
